title: [WORKSHOP] Notify: Payment Service Issue Detection
description: When a Davis problem is detected on payment-service, creates a GitHub issue and sends an email notification.

eventTrigger.filterQuery: event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE" AND (event.status_transition == "CREATED" OR event.status_transition == "UPDATED" OR event.status_transition == "REOPENED") AND (event.category == "ERROR") AND (matchesValue(entity_tags, "app:workshop") AND matchesValue(entity_tags, "environment:dynakube-simple-vm-1"))

get_owners_1.name: get_owners_1
get_owners_1.description: Retrieves owners from Entities and Team identifiers.

input.title: {{event()["event.name"]}}

execute_dql_query_1.name: execute_dql_query_1

input.query:
fetch events
| filter event.id == "{{event()["event.id"]}}" 
| lookup [
  fetch events
  | filter event.type == "CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT" and  dt.smartscape_source.type == "SERVICE"
  | fields dt.source_entity,deployment.url
], sourceField:root_cause_entity_id, lookupField:dt.source_entity
| filter isNotNull(lookup.deployment.url)
| dedup lookup.deployment.url
| fields lookup.deployment.url

execute_dql_query_1.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.

extract_problem_details.name: extract_problem_details
extract_problem_details.description: Extract problem details from the Davis event for use in downstream tasks

send_email_notification.name: send_email_notification

input.subject: [Dynatrace Alert] Payment Service: {{ event()["event.name"] }}

send_email_notification.description: Send email notification about the detected problem
